summary: Implemented homepage audio autoplay attempt with non-blocking fallback controls, added the "Camp Riley" show and updated generatedImages mappings for Camp Riley and the "Grave danger dace" scare zone. However, required new image asset files are not present in the diff, and "Camp Riley" is not explicitly marked as a kid show via a dedicated field (only implied by description). Diff summary also indicates several unrelated homepage/sections visual/content changes not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a new show entry named "Camp Riley" ... marked as a kid show "Coming 2027"
missing_requirements.reason: The show entry includes a kid-friendly description and "Coming 2027" text, but there is no explicit field indicating it is a kid show (the object only shows name/description/hauntSeasonOnly). If the app expects an explicit kid-show marker, this is not implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: A new image file exists under frontend/public/assets/generated with filename show-camp-riley.dim_1400x900.jpg
missing_requirements.reason: The generatedImages mapping points to the asset path, but the diff shows no added files (Added: 0), so the required image file is not evidenced as added.

missing_requirements.requirement: A new image file exists under frontend/public/assets/generated with filename zone-undead-dance-party.dim_1400x900.jpg
missing_requirements.reason: The scareZones mapping was updated to point to the new asset path, but the diff shows no added files (Added: 0), so the required image file is not evidenced as added.

hallucinated_features.description: Major visual/theme changes to HorrorBackground (new chainsaw-themed layers, overlays, scanlines, etc.)
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any requirement; BuildRequest is limited to autoplay audio + show/scare-zone image updates.

hallucinated_features.description: Home hero section content updated with new "Fire Remix" energetic description and showtime details
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; requirements only mention autoplay audio and adding Camp Riley + image mapping changes.

hallucinated_features.description: Auditions section adds a new "Show Host Auditions (coming 2029)" card

Food booths content changed (exports eleven booths including new "Steampunk Eats"; pricing/menu updates; new detail page links)
Scare zones section behavior/content changed to display exactly four scare zones
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; only the image mapping for an existing scare zone was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Info/Location section content heavily updated (hours, tickets, pass types, rules, warnings, etc.)
